general.supportedLngs: Also this bot supports {{langs}} languages now, if you want to add more languages you can send a pull request to source code of bot.

start.t2: Click the button below or use the /helpb command for information on how to use the bot.

brat.useBratAsReply: Use /b as a reply to the message or quote the part of message you want to quote.
brat.savedMessage: This sticker already added to package, you don't need to add again.
brat.onlyTextAllowed: You can only convert text messages to brat stickers...

sectionLng.pleaseSelect: Welcome to brat Sticker Bot help menu.
sectionLng.pleaseSelect2: If you’re stuck with the bot, having trouble understanding it, or have any questions, you can click the category buttons below for help. If you still haven’t found the answer you’re looking for, you can ask the developer or other members for help in this group. Since this bot is a project I work on in my spare time just for fun, it may take me a while to fix or notice any bugs.
sectionLng.firstMsg: If you reply to a message with the /b command, the bot will turn it into a brat sticker. If you want to customize the sticker, you can include the following parameters with the command:

commands.rbe: rbe: Removes the slight blur effect from the image.
commands.png: png: Sends it as a PNG instead of a sticker.
commands.scr: scr: Adds a scribble effect to the top
commands.color: [color]: Changes the background to green (gr is green, wh is white, bl is blue)

sectionLng.saveUsage: If you want, you can save generated brat stickers into group sticker pack with /bs command. You need to reply to which sticker you want to save. That command doesn't needs any argument or something else.
sectionLng.saveUsage2: You can save a sticker to a group pack in two different ways: by clicking the “Save to group pack” button below the sticker you created, or by replying to any sticker you want to save with the /bs command.
sectionLng.whitelist: Under normal circumstances, only group administrators have the permission to save stickers to the group pack. If you want specific members to be able to add stickers to the pack as well, you can use the whitelist feature.

wh_usages.list: /wh_list: Lists everyone added to the group's whitelist
wh_usages.add: /wh_add (user_id): Adds the user with the specified ID to the whitelist
wh_usages.remove: /wh_rm (user_id): Removes the user with the specified ID from the whitelist

help.lang: You can use /langb command for changing your language for this chat (only pm, group and supergroup is supported).

about.text1: If you'd like to view the source code, you can access it from this repository in GitHub. (don’t forget to give a ⭐)

baseErrs.onlyGroup: This feature can be used only in groups and supergroups.
baseErrs.replyRequired: You need to reply a message for save it into sticker pack.
baseErrs.allowedMedia: To save it, you need to reply to a sticker or photo. Other types aren't allowed.
baseErrs.idIsUnknown: The sender of the message is unknown; please try again or ask someone else to save it.
baseErrs.invalidPerms: You must be an administrator to use this feature.
baseErrs.maxSizeReached: The current group pack has reached its maximum number of stickers ({{maxSize}}), so a new pack is being created.

errs.ANIMATED_STICKERS_NOT_ALLOWED: ⚠️ Animated stickers and videos isn't allowed to add into pack.
errs.UNKNOWN_ERROR: ⚠️ An unknown error occurred in bot side, please try again or report that to bot developer.
errs.USER_NOT_STARTED_BOT: ⚠️ To create or manage sticker packs, Telegram requires you to start the bot in private messages first. Please click 👉 @brat_sticker_bot and press START, then try again.

save.SUCCESS_CREATE: A new sticker pack of brats for this group ({{chatName}}) has been created by {{userName}} right now. You can add more stickers with /bs command into that new pack.
save.SUCCESS_ADD: Sticker has been successfully added to the group brat sticker pack successfully by {{adderName}}

errs.onlyGroup: This command is designed for groups, not personal messages.
errs.thisIsNotNumeric: Value: {{value}} isn't looks like a numeric ID value
errs.thisIdIsntInThisChat: There is no one with this ID in this group. Please check it again.
errs.isLeftOrKicked: Unfortunately, this user cannot be added to the whitelist due to their role in the group. They may have been banned, left, or removed from the group. User's role: {{role}}
errs.unknown: This user's role and permissions in the group could not be determined for an unknown reason. Maybe there's no any user with this ID, he/she isn't joined this group or anything else.
errs.alreadyAdded: This user is already added to whitelist. You can check all whitelisted users with /wh_list command.
errs.notAdded: This user is not on the whitelist or the ID is incorrect; please check again (you can list everyone added to the whitelist using /wh_list)
errs.anErrorOccurred: An unknown error occurred while listing whitelisted users, please try again or report to developer.

wh.successAdd: {{userName}} added to whitelist successfully by admin {{adminName}}
wh.successDelete: {{userName}} is removed from whitelist by admin {{adminName}}
wh.listingHeader: Totally {{userSize}} user is whitelisted in this group
